scrape_interval.description: Scrape Interval (Normal default was 30s and 5s for sli)
scrape_interval.title: scrape_interval

scrape_metrics_optimization.description: Metrics Optimization. For memory and cost optimization, low level metrics are dropped For api server, Buckets metrics are high cardinality metrics that are not used in alerting but in debugging and consume a lot of memory
scrape_metrics_optimization.title: scrape_metrics_optimization

core_dns.description: Scrape of the Core Dns server
core_dns.title: core_dns

enabled.description: Boolean to indicate that this chart is or will be installed in the cluster
enabled.title: Enabled

global.description: Global values are values that can be accessed from any chart or subchart by exactly the same name.
global.title: global

enabled.description: Enable [Kube State Metrics Exporter](https://github.com/kubernetes/kube-state-metrics). It exports apps/functional state metrics.
enabled.title: enabled

memory.description: The max memory of the exporter (without optimization, minimum 150Mi to allow the memory spike at startup)
memory.title: memory

memory_optimization.description: Optimize memory. This exporter has a [memory spike](https://github.com/kubernetes/kube-state-metrics/issues/958) at startup due to config map and secrets loading.
memory_optimization.title: memory_optimization

install_cross_dependency.description: const: false @schema Constant used to not output template from kubee cross dependency in Chart.yaml Don't change, don't touch
install_cross_dependency.title: install_cross_dependency

kubelet.description: Scrape of the kubelet (CPU and Memory Resources)

scrape_interval.description: Scrape interval. Why 45s. Headlamp uses a CPU rate functon over 1 minutes If the scrape interval is above 1m, there is no data returned
scrape_interval.title: scrape_interval

scrape_metrics_optimization.description: Metrics Optimization. For memory and cost optimization, low level metrics are dropped For api server, Buckets metrics are high cardinality metrics that are not used in alerting but in debugging and consume a lot of memory
scrape_metrics_optimization.title: scrape_metrics_optimization

kubelet.title: kubelet

enabled.description: Enable [Node Exporter](https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter) It will gather server resources metrics
enabled.title: enabled

memory.description: Max memory of the exporter (On Kube Prometheus, it was set to 180Mi)
memory.title: memory

scrape_metrics_optimization.description: Memory and cost optimization. Low levels metrics are dropped
scrape_metrics_optimization.title: scrape_metrics_optimization
